prompt:
A 2x2 grid layout consisting of 4 panels for a luxury Japanese food advertisement featuring exquisite white rice. Set on a beautiful wooden table with a consistent world-building across all panels, featuring warm natural light, rising steam, and a sense of Japanese luxury. Hyper-realistic, ultra-high-definition food photography aiming for a culinary magazine cover quality. Every grain of rice is visible and beautiful with an appetizing gloss, cinematic light and shadow, and shallow depth of field. The traditional pot (hagama) and rice paddle must remain identical across all panels.

Top Left (Panel 1):
The lid of a traditional hagama pot is open, filled with freshly cooked white rice. Each grain is distinct and fluffy. Steam rises vigorously, capturing the fresh aroma and premium texture of the rice.

Top Right (Panel 2):
A moment of scooping the rice from the pot with a wooden paddle. The rice is lifted softly as steam rises, showing the careful skill of a craftsman and the brilliance of the grains in an immersive composition.

Bottom Left (Panel 3):
An extreme close-up of a generous serving of white rice on the paddle. Every grain is sharp, showing a translucent gloss and fluffy texture. Macro photography with a heavily blurred background to express the ultimate beauty of the rice itself.

Bottom Right (Panel 4):
White rice served in a beautiful black traditional Japanese bowl with an elegant, high-end feel. A perfect mountain-shaped serving with rising steam in a sophisticated composition reflecting Japanese aesthetics. The rice is the sole protagonist; no other food or dishes are depicted.
High-end Japanese food advertising, premium white rice, freshly cooked, steam, distinct grains, Japanese food culture, craftsmanship, quality wooden table, natural light, hyper-realistic, ultra-HD, photorealistic, food photography, macro, appetizing texture, magazine cover level, overwhelming visual beauty, exquisite composition, highest quality food photography.
